channel.title: Healthy Boundaries on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Healthy Boundaries on MinWeb

item.title: Why You Should Stop Saying "We Need to Talk
item.description: Stop using the phrase we need to talk to prevent unnecessary panic and defensiveness by replacing vague communication with clarity to build psychological...

item.title: Why You Should Stop Commenting on People’s Bodies
item.description: Learn why commenting on people's bodies—even with good intentions—can cause lasting harm and discover why choosing to mind your own business is better for all.
